name: Macro Detail
description: Экстремально крупный план материалов, кнопок, текстуры. Очень малая глубина резкости. Премиум крафт.
prompt_prefix: Extreme macro product photography. Close-up of product materials, buttons, texture, craftsmanship details. Very shallow depth of field. Bokeh background. Premium jewelry-catalog quality. The detail must sell the quality. Ultra realistic. 8K. Natural light reflections on surfaces.
composition: Extreme close-up on one key detail, 90% of frame filled with texture/materials
lighting: Soft directional light raking across surface to emphasize texture, subtle fill
